data.department: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.name AS department, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.students s
  ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY student_count DESC, department ASC;

issues: Preflight schema discovery previously failed; the plan warned that logical field names were provisional. The SQL references public.departments and public.students but the schema/tables/columns were not confirmed.

The SQL ORDER BY includes a secondary sort (department ASC) for tie-breaking, but the Vega-Lite encoding only specifies sorting the x-axis by student_count descending; tie-breaking by department is not represented in the visualization.

The SQL uses a LEFT JOIN to include departments with zero students; confirm whether the visualization/data should show departments with zero counts (metadata sample/rowCount may not include such rows).
Department names in the sample are long; labelAngle -40 may or may not prevent overlap depending on rendering—consider wrapping or additional layout adjustments if labels overlap.

data.department: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
SELECT d.name AS department, COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.students s
  ON s.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY student_count DESC, department ASC;
